GOAL Performance Marketing
Geographic targeting · May 2026
ZIP centroids via GeoNames

The May 2026 Priority #1 Home & Auto target ZIP list (395 ZIPs) overlaid on the carrier Homeowners catastrophe-exclusion ZIP list (333 ZIPs). 112 ZIPs — 28.4% of the target list — appear on both. 96 of the 112 fall in the Greater Houston region; 75 are in Harris County.

Where the lists overlap

Gulf Coast region · one dot per ZIP centroid

Target vs Exclusion ZIPsGulf Coast · where all 112 overlaps fall

Gulf Coast detail — all overlap (112) and exclusion-list (221) ZIPs fall in this region. Targeted-only ZIPs elsewhere in Texas (DFW, Austin, West Texas) are off-frame. 8 Corpus Christi PO-box ZIPs lack a centroid.

Summary

112 of 395 target ZIPs are on the carrier exclusion list

Target list: 395 ZIPs. Exclusion list: 333 ZIPs. On both: 112 (28.4% of the target list), across 16 counties. By carrier zone: 7 require a wind/hail exclusion (Coastal 1A), 90 fall in Coastal Zone 2 North, 15 in Catastrophe-Score groups.
